name: Timothy Wouters
cooked: Okayyyy, after following this thread for a year and half I finally caved in after seeing compatriot Tim’s video today and bought one. I kept myself from buying one because I funded the tape! kickstarter, which is a bit in the same size and category. But one can never have two many small 4 track contraptions.
raw: Okayyyy, after following this thread for a year and half I finally caved in after seeing compatriot Tim’s video today and bought one. I kept myself from buying one because I funded the tape! kickstarter, which is a bit in the same size and category. But one can never have two many small 4 track contraptions. ;-)
